text_block_list.text:
One morning, while I'm taking a stroll<n>around the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Grow nice and healthy so your<n>beautiful
flowers can bloom! ♪

I spot Nishino Flower tending to some<n>flowers. In
the next moment...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Nishino Flower!<n>Teacher's been
looking for you.<n>Something to do with your duties<n>
today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I mean... Thank you for telling me.<n>I'll be there
right away.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Anyway, I'm done here,<n>so bye!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was really taking my time watering<n>the flowers,
so I've only gotten<n>around to half of them!
choice_data_list: Let's share the work and get it done faster!
I'll fill up the watering can for you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... you'll help me?! Thank you so<n>much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and please remember to talk to<n>the flowers a
lot while you're<n>watering them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They'll feel happier and bloom more<n>beautifully if
you do!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for dragging you into this, but<n>thank you
very much! I'll do my part<n>as quickly as I can.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! I'll talk to the flowers<n>faster too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Grow up nicely and broduce<n>peautiful—ack!
P-produce beautiful<n>flowers!
